name: Modern Mobility Aids, Inc.
summary: Modern Mobility Aids, Inc. does not have significant operations. The company focuses on the production and distribution of medical marijuana in North America. Previously, it was engaged in the distribution of products for mobility challenged individuals. The company was formerly known as Galileo Life Sciences, Inc. and changed its name to Modern Mobility Aids, Inc. in October 2017. Modern Mobility Aids, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
